name: open
description: Controls whether the dialog is open.

name: onOpenChange
description: Called when the open state changes.

name: onClose
description: Called when the dialog closes (in addition to open state updates).

name: title
description: Title text shown in the header.

name: description
description: Description text shown below the title.

name: actions
description: Action buttons rendered in the footer.

name: footer
description: Fully custom footer content; use instead of the actions prop.

name: showCloseButton
description: Whether to show the close (X) control in the header.

name: closeOnOverlayClick
description: Close the dialog when the overlay is clicked.

name: closeOnEscape
description: Close the dialog when Escape is pressed.
